appliedUpdates.description: Chrome browser processes interfere with Electron CDP connection. Solution: Kill all Chrome processes (taskkill /F /IM chrome.exe) before connecting agent-browser to Electron app. Electron will then be the only CDP-accessible browser.

notes: The blok-fix milestone contains bug fixes (fix-blok-status-badge, fix-transaction-blok-status-filter) that don't have their own fulfills entries. The assertions tested are from the blok-master milestone features that the bug fixes address. User testing successfully verified UI changes via browser automation.
